name: Holland Law Group, P.A.
description_short: Florida consumer law firm providing attorney-led bankruptcy, debt defense, and foreclosure defense across the state. Free initial consultation available.
description_long:
Holland Law Group, P.A. is a Florida-based consumer law firm founded on February 6, 2015 by principal attorney David N. Holland, Esq. (Florida Bar License #87937). The firm operates as a Professional Association registered in Florida and holds an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau, which opened its file in August 2017. Unlike credit repair companies or debt settlement mills, Holland Law Group provides licensed legal representation — clients work directly with a barred attorney, not intake staff or paralegals. The firm operates statewide, with offices in Stuart, Bradenton, Sarasota, Tampa, Largo, Venice, Lakewood Ranch, Miami, Orlando, Jacksonville, Fort Myers, and Palm Beach, covering virtually every major Florida county.

The firm's core practice areas center on helping Florida consumers in financial distress. Services include Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings, debt defense against collection lawsuits and aggressive collectors, foreclosure defense (including loan modification assistance), and consumer rights claims under the FDCPA and FCRA. David Holland is also admitted to practice in the Middle District of Florida federal court, enabling representation in federal-level consumer protection matters. The firm offers a free initial consultation — by phone or in-office — and works out individualized fee schedules tailored to each client's financial situation, as no standard pricing tiers are publicly listed.

What distinguishes Holland Law Group from non-attorney debt relief services is the direct attorney relationship. Clients are not handed off to case managers or processors — the licensed attorney handles the matter. The firm claims to have helped over 1,000 Floridians achieve a fresh financial start. After case resolution, the firm refers clients to third-party credit repair resources to begin rebuilding, though credit repair itself is not an in-house service. The statewide footprint with 11+ office locations is notable for a firm of its size, making in-person consultations accessible throughout Florida.

Holland Law Group is a strong option for Florida residents who need actual legal representation — not just debt negotiation or credit repair. Bankruptcy, foreclosure defense, and FDCPA/FCRA litigation require a licensed attorney, and this firm delivers that directly. The main limitation is geography: services are Florida-only. Additionally, fees are case-specific and not published, so consumers cannot easily compare costs upfront without scheduling a consultation. There is no money-back guarantee, which is standard and legally expected for attorney services under bar rules.
address: 5966 S Dixie Hwy STE 300, Miami, FL 33143

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee — standard for licensed law firms under Florida Bar rules. Fees are case-specific and quoted after a free initial consultation.

certifications: Federal Bar — Middle District of Florida

pros: Licensed Florida attorney (Bar #87937) handles cases directly — not paralegals or intake staff
A+ BBB rating with accreditation since 2017
Free initial consultation by phone or in-office
Statewide Florida coverage with 11+ office locations from Miami to Jacksonville
Federal court admission (Middle District of Florida) for federal consumer protection cases
Fee schedules tailored to client's individual financial situation
Post-case credit repair referrals to help clients rebuild after bankruptcy or debt resolution
cons: Florida residents only — no services available outside the state
Fees are not published; pricing requires a consultation to obtain a quote
No in-house credit repair — post-case rebuilding is referred to third parties
No dedicated mobile app or verified client portal beyond the payment page
Criminal defense is listed in attorney bio but is not the firm's primary focus — may not be suited for complex criminal matters
best_for: Florida residents facing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy
Homeowners in foreclosure seeking legal defense or loan modification
Consumers being sued by debt collectors or creditors
Individuals experiencing FDCPA or FCRA violations by collectors or creditors
diagnosis: Holland Law Group is best suited for Florida consumers who need licensed legal representation for bankruptcy, foreclosure, or debt collection lawsuits — situations where a credit repair service or debt settlement company cannot legally help. The firm's direct attorney model and statewide presence are genuine strengths. The main caveat is that services are limited to Florida, and without published fees, cost comparisons require scheduling a consultation first.
services: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy filing and repayment plan negotiation
FDCPA (Fair Debt Collection Practices Act) claims
Cease and desist representation against debt collectors
